headline: Jim Cramer Says “I Think You Buy Some Lennar Tomorrow”
summary: Lennar Corporation (NYSE:LEN) was among the stocks covered in Jim Cramer’s Mad Money recap as he urged investors to focus on the fundamentals of companies. A caller mentioned they bought LEN and TOL shares after hearing bullish comments from Cramer, but noted that LEN has been down. Cramer replied: You buy Lennar. I saw, I […]
